{{Quote|More nerf sausage, Master Jacen? It is a particular Corellian favorite.|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague">''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''</ref>}}
A spicy [[Sausage/Legends|sausage]], '''nerf sausage''' was a particular [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] favorite. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once remarked that [[Dewlannamapia|Dewlanna]], Han's childhood guardian, used to make [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] sausage for [[Gender/Legends|him]] when he was small.
